## Description

Brief description of what this PR does.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / code improvement

## Related Issues

Closes #(issue number)

## Changes Made

- Change 1
- Change 2

## Testing

- [ ] App builds without errors (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Linting passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Tested against [testing checklist](docs/development.md#testing-checklist)
- [ ] New functionality has been manually tested

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots of the changes.

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (if applicable)
- [ ] I have added/updated comments where the logic isn't self-evident
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have tested this change in a browser
